--- memory ---
GpuProjectExec: row_width=192, subtree_max_row_bytes=384
  GpuGlobalLimitExec: row_width=192, subtree_max_row_bytes=320
    GpuCrossJoinExec: row_width=192, subtree_max_row_bytes=320
      GpuProjectExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=96
        GpuGlobalLimitExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=96
          GpuAggregateExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=96
            GpuCoalescePartitionsExec: row_width=64, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
              GpuAggregateExec: row_width=64, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=68
                  GpuFilterExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=68
                    GpuScanExec: row_width=52, subtree_max_row_bytes=52
      GpuProjectExec: row_width=160, subtree_max_row_bytes=320

          GpuCrossJoinExec: row_width=160, subtree_max_row_bytes=256
